prompts.prompt:
Do NOT include any product, logo, or branding in this ad. This should look like an organic social post, not an ad.

Create a curiosity gap scroll-stopper hook ad. 1080x1080.

COMPOSITION:
One continuous image filling the entire frame.

Top 35%: clean white background with large bold black sans-serif text (heavy weight, tight leading, left-aligned): "Väčšina ľudí, čo berie kreatín, robí túto chybu — a prichádza o 30% výsledkov, pretože..."

The last words trail off followed by "...viac" in lighter gray text (rgb ~180,180,180), mimicking a truncated Instagram caption that requires clicking more to expand. The headline feels mid-sentence, unfinished.

Bottom 65%: a close-up, slightly uncomfortable editorial photo of a man's forearms and hands gripping a barbell rack in a gym. Hands show strain — veins visible, grip tight, the bar slightly blurred in the foreground. Gym background dark and out of focus. No product visible, no branding, no logo anywhere. Shot feels raw and documentary — not fitness-stock-photo polished. Slightly shallow depth of field, real gym lighting (tungsten + fluorescent mix).

No text on the photo zone. No product. No logo. No CTA button. No brand name anywhere.

TYPOGRAPHY:
Heavy bold sans-serif for the headline (Inter Black / Helvetica Neue Bold — platform-native feeling). "...viac" in the same font at lighter gray weight (~180,180,180).

SAFE ZONES:
Top 270px and bottom 270px clear of all text and key elements.

COLOR AND TREATMENT:
White text zone, sharp. Photo zone raw and unretouched — slightly gritty gym feel.

MOOD:
Curiosity-provoking, slightly unsettling. The viewer must stop to find out what the mistake is.

Use the attached product image as the primary reference — reproduce the product EXACTLY as it appears in the photo, do not invent or alter shape, color, labels, or design.

Create a curiosity-gap hook testimonial ad for GymBeam's Crea7in. 1080x1080.

COMPOSITION:
One continuous image filling the entire frame. Background: clean white throughout.

Top center: large dark navy opening curly quotation marks.

Below: mixed-weight headline in black:
- First line: "Myslel som si, že" in italic serif, small size
- Next 2 lines: "KREATÍN NEFUNGUJE" in enormous heavy-weight bold all-caps sans-serif — this dominates the entire upper half
- Below in smaller sentence-case regular weight: "— kým som nevymenil ten môj za Crea7in. Za 3 týždne som pridal 8 kg na drep."

Closing curly quotation marks. Below: "— Tomáš R." in regular weight italic.

Left side bottom third: the Crea7in product (reproduced exactly from reference) at a slight angle with a small scoop of white powder scattered beside it on a clean surface.

To the left of the product: a circular dark navy seal badge reading "GymBeam / #1 Bestseller" with white text on navy background.

Right side bottom third: five large filled gold stars and bold text "1 207 recenzií — 4,7/5" with small GymBeam wordmark below.

Bottom edge: small gray disclaimer text "Individuálne výsledky sa môžu líšiť." in regular weight gray.

TYPOGRAPHY:
Bait phrase KREATÍN NEFUNGUJE dominates — ultra-black, massive. Setup italic secondary. Reveal smaller, sentence-case. Typography weight contrast IS the scroll-stop.

SAFE ZONES:
Top 270px and bottom 270px clear of all text and key elements.

COLOR AND TREATMENT:
White background. Dark navy accent on quotation marks and badge. Gold stars. Product naturally lit.

MOOD:
Provocative, clever. Cold read: kreatín nefunguje — alarming. Second read: it is a rave review.

Use the attached product image as the primary reference — reproduce the product EXACTLY as it appears in the photo, do not invent or alter shape, color, labels, or design.

Create a bold statement ad for GymBeam's Crea7in. 1080x1080.

COMPOSITION:
One continuous image filling the entire frame. Background: vibrant diagonal gradient from deep navy blue (#0D1B2A) in the upper left flowing to electric blue (#1565C0) in the lower right, with a subtle hint of teal at the bottom edge.

Upper-left: oversized bold white headline in heavy condensed sans-serif (Impact / Bebas Neue style):
7 FORIEM.
1 VÝSLEDOK.
ŽIADNE VÝHOVORKY.

Text feels aggressive, direct, unapologetic — tight line spacing, fills the upper-left zone.

Right side: a muscular male hand and forearm reaching in from the upper-right frame edge, gripping the Crea7in product (reproduced exactly from reference). Product sits center-right, slightly below the midline. The grip looks intentional and powerful, not posed.

Bottom-left: GymBeam wordmark in white, clean sans-serif, small. Below it: Crea7in — 7 foriem kreatínu in lighter white, even smaller.

No stats. No reviews. No badges. Gradient and headline carry the whole ad.

TYPOGRAPHY:
Heavy condensed bold white sans-serif (Impact / Bebas Neue). The weight and scale dominate. Aggressive, gym-native feel.

SAFE ZONES:
Top 270px and bottom 270px clear of all text and key elements.

COLOR AND TREATMENT:
Deep navy-to-electric-blue diagonal gradient. White headline for maximum contrast. Product naturally lit with subtle shadow on the gradient. Hand partially cropped at frame edge.

MOOD:
Confident, aggressive, performance-first. The brand does not explain itself. It dares you to keep up.

Use the attached product image as the primary reference — reproduce the product EXACTLY as it appears in the photo, do not invent or alter shape, color, labels, or design.

Create a negative-marketing bait-and-switch ad for GymBeam's Crea7in. 1080x1350, 4:5.

COMPOSITION:
One continuous image filling the entire frame. Background: macro close-up of the Crea7in product (reproduced exactly from reference), slightly blurred (f/2.0 depth of field), filling the entire frame as a soft dark backdrop. The packaging label is visible but soft-focused in the background.

Center: a white rounded-rectangle review card in Amazon-style layout, overlaid on the product background. Card contents:
- Top left: small gray circular default user-icon avatar
- Name: Marek T. in bold dark sans-serif
- Rating: one gold filled star + four empty gray stars (one-star rating)
- Orange rounded-pill badge reading Overený nákup in white text
- Bold dark sans-serif review text (2-3 lines): Nenávidím Crea7in — teraz musím každý týždeň zvyšovať váhy a nemôžem prestať.

Drop shadow under the card. Card has rounded corners, clean white.

Bottom of frame below the card: oversized bold white condensed sans-serif RECENZIE HOVORILI. — shadowed slightly for contrast against the blurred product background.

Bottom-right corner: GymBeam wordmark in white, small.

Small Reklama tag top-left corner in light gray.

TYPOGRAPHY:
Review card mimics Amazon marketplace UI — default sans-serif. RECENZIE HOVORILI. uses bold condensed white display font at maximum scale.

SAFE ZONES:
Top 270px and bottom 340px clear of all text and key elements.

COLOR AND TREATMENT:
White card with soft drop shadow. Orange Overený nákup pill. One gold star, four empty gray. Product background in shallow-depth blur — still recognizable as Crea7in but softened.

MOOD:
Provocative, dry, scroll-stopping. Cold read: 1 hviezdička — čo sa stalo? Second read: the complaint is that it works too well.
